articles.title: Trump nominates Kevin Warsh for Fed chair amid Senate and DOJ standoff - prismnews.com
articles.snippet: # Trump nominates Kevin Warsh for Fed chair amid Senate and DOJ standoff. President Trump nominated Kevin Warsh to lead the Federal Reserve, touting bipartisan support as a Justice Department inquiry and a Senate blockade threaten confirmation.
